SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: Grants to organizations involved in education training to for low economic areas individuals. Six grants to 6 different organizations in 2022

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: East Africa Village Outreach - Grant for the construction of a primary school building
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: Los Angeles Christian School - Support operating budget

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: Applications are available upon request or may use the format on the website www.theparakletefoundation.org. The project costs and grant requested amount must be fully described.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: Grants are made for education training and experience individual in lower economic areas.s.

NonCashPropertyContributionGrp.NoncashPropertyDesc: 300 shares of KO and 700 shares of CODI

AllOtherProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Desc: Shepherd's Gate Hoover Elementary Public School Restore Stockton and Casa Serena. See list on Part I Line 25
